title: Garmin Joins Fitbit, Whoop With Its First Screenless Fitness Tracker
summary: Screenless activity trackers are the latest battleground for wearable makers, and Garmin is ready to enter the race with the Cirqa Smart Band , which is designed to reduce distractions while collecting your everyday health data.
